rationale: Educ. Code §49.102 governs school district annexation and detachment procedures. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Except to the extent of any conflict with this chapter and except for any requirement that detached property must be annexed to a school district that is contiguous to the detached territory, the annexation and detachment is governed by Chapter 13.
_note: Rule text concerns annexation/detachment procedure, not homestead exemptions; no conflict with proposed change.
